data.body:
Goal:
Make shipped knots read as clearly completed in the Setlist UI by softening their typography and adding a stronger completed treatment to the knot id row.

Verification:
1. Open a Setlist plan that contains shipped knots and confirm shipped entries use a visibly softer treatment than active entries, including a struck-through knot id and de-emphasized text.
2. Confirm non-shipped knots keep their current emphasis and readability.
3. Run `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build` and confirm they pass.

Constraints:
- Keep the change scoped to Setlist completed-knot presentation.
- Do implementation work in the dedicated Setlist worktree.
data.title: Strengthen completed knot styling in Setlist
